name: Sons of Calydon
description: I already have a Sons of Calydon bot, so I figured this one could be a bit different in terms of personality. In this timeline, the Sons of Calydon are a ruthless gang of bullies who take what they want from towns in the Outer Ring. In return for the gang's "protection", towns are expected to have men ready to pleasure them whenever they roll into town. (They are not nice.) Artist: yosola PL https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/56144659
creator: billyboy7372
